name: hs_bundle_id
label: Bundle
description: associated bundle Product

name: hs_is_parent
label: Is parent
description: Whether or not this LineItem has child LineItems associated with it

name: hs_line_item_group_config_id
label: Line item group config id
description: The ID of a Line Item Group Config

name: hs_line_item_group_instance_key
label: Line item group instance key
description: Instance ID of a Line Item Group

name: hs_num_child_line_items
label: Number of child Line Items
description: Count of the child Line Items associated with this Line Item

name: hs_parent_line_item_id
label: Parent Line Item ID
description: Reference to the parent LineItem (for nested LineItems)

name: createdate
label: Create date
description: The date the line item was created

name: description
label: Description
description: Full description of product

name: hs_all_accessible_team_ids
label: All teams
description: The team IDs, including the team hierarchy, of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_assigned_business_unit_ids
label: Business units
description: The business units this record is assigned to.

name: hs_all_owner_ids
label: All owner IDs
description: Values of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_all_team_ids
label: All team IDs
description: The team IDs of all default and custom owner properties for this record.

name: hs_allow_buyer_selected_quantity
label: Allow buyer selected quantity
description: Whether buyer selected quantity is to be enabled or not for a LineItem

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Object create date/time
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_external_id
label: External line item id
description: The ID of a line item

name: hs_group_key
label: Group key
description: Grouped line items are related line item segments

name: hs_images
label: Image URL
description: Product images.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Last Modified Date
description: The date any property on this product was modified

name: hs_line_item_currency_code
label: Currency
description: Currency code for the line item.

name: hs_locked
label: Locked
description: True if this line item is locked and cannot be modified

name: hs_merged_object_ids
label: Merged record IDs
description: The list of record IDs that have been merged into this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_id
label: Record ID
description: The unique ID for this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_object_source
label: Record creation source
description: Raw internal PropertySource present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_1
label: Record source detail 1
description: First level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_2
label: Record source detail 2
description: Second level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_detail_3
label: Record source detail 3
description: Third level of detail on how this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_id
label: Record creation source ID
description: Raw internal sourceId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_label
label: Record source
description: How this record was created.

name: hs_object_source_user_id
label: Record creation source user ID
description: Raw internal userId present in the RequestMeta when this record was created.

name: hs_origin_key
label: Origin key
description: Identifier to track the origin of the Line Item

name: hs_owning_teams
label: Owning Teams
description: The teams that are attributed to this record.

name: hs_parent_object_type_id
label: Parent Object Type Id
description: Object type id of the parent object

name: hs_pinned_engagement_id
label: Pinned engagement ID
description: The object ID of the current pinned engagement. This will only be shown in the app if there is already an association to the engagement.

name: hs_position_on_quote
label: Position on quote
description: The order which the line item appears on the quotes

name: hs_product_id
label: Product
description: ID of the product this was copied from

name: hs_product_type
label: Product type
description: The type of product. By default, categorize your product as either Inventory, Non-Inventory or Service.

name: hs_prorating_scale
label: Prorating scale
description: Prorating scale multiplier

name: hs_ramp_key
label: Ramp key
description: Logical grouping for ramped line items

name: hs_read_only
label: Read only object
description: Determines whether a record can be edited by a user.

name: hs_rich_text_description
label: Line Item Description
description: Full description of product with rich text formatting

name: hs_shared_team_ids
label: Shared teams
description: Additional teams whose users can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows or APIs.

name: hs_shared_user_ids
label: Shared users
description: Additional users that can access the record based on their permissions. This can be set manually or through Workflows and APIs.

name: hs_sku
label: SKU
description: Unique product identifier

name: hs_sync_amount
label: Sync amount
description: The amount set by Ecommerce sync

name: hs_tax_category
label: Tax category
description: The tax category used to determine what amount of tax to automatically apply to this line item

name: hs_unique_creation_key
label: Unique creation key
description: Unique property used for idempotent creates

name: hs_updated_by_user_id
label: Updated by user ID
description: The user who last updated this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_url
label: URL
description: Product url.

name: hs_use_prorating
label: Use prorating
description: Opt in to prorating calculation

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_followers
label: User IDs of all notification followers
description: The user IDs of all users that have clicked follow within the object to opt-in to getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_notification_unfollowers
label: User IDs of all notification unfollowers
description: The user IDs of all object owners that have clicked unfollow within the object to opt-out of getting follow notifications

name: hs_user_ids_of_all_owners
label: User IDs of all owners
description: The user IDs of all owners of this record.

name: hs_variant_id
label: Variant id of the product
description: Variant id of the shopify product

name: hs_was_imported
label: Performed in an import
description: Object is part of an import

name: hubspot_owner_assigneddate
label: Owner assigned date
description: The most recent timestamp of when an owner was assigned to this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hubspot_owner_id
label: Owner
description: The owner of the object.

name: hubspot_team_id
label: Owner's main team
description: The main team of the record owner. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: name
label: Name
description: Product name

name: amount
label: Net price
description: The amount of a line item

name: discount
label: Unit discount
description: The discount amount applied

name: hs_acv
label: Annual contract value
description: The annual contract value (ACV) of this product

name: hs_arr
label: Annual recurring revenue
description: The annual recurring revenue (ARR) of this product

name: hs_auto_tax_amount
label: Automatic tax amount
description: The amount of tax automatically calculated for this line item by an external system

name: hs_cost_of_goods_sold
label: Unit cost
description: The amount that sold goods cost the HubSpot customer

name: hs_discount_percentage
label: Discount percentage
description: The discount percentage applied

name: hs_effective_unit_price
label: Effective unit price
description: Price that gets applied to this line item when volume tier pricing is used

name: hs_external_tax_rate_id
label: External tax rate ID
description: The unique identifier in the external system (e.g., Xero) from where the TaxRate was imported.

name: hs_margin
label: Margin
description: The margin value of this product

name: hs_margin_acv
label: Annual contract value margin
description: The margin annual contract value of this product

name: hs_margin_arr
label: Annual recurring revenue margin
description: The margin annual recurring revenue of this product

name: hs_margin_mrr
label: Monthly recurring revenue margin
description: The margin monthly recurring revenue of this product

name: hs_margin_tcv
label: Total contract value margin
description: The margin total contract value of this product

name: hs_mrr
label: Monthly recurring revenue
description: The monthly recurring revenue (MRR) of this product

name: hs_post_tax_amount
label: Net price after tax
description: Amount of line item after applying tax

name: hs_pre_discount_amount
label: Pre discount amount
description: The pre-discount amount of a line item

name: hs_price_book_id
label: Price Book Identifier
description: Price book this line item is made out of

name: hs_pricing_model
label: Pricing model
description: Defines the pricing model as either 'flat' or one of three tiered options

name: hs_recurring_billing_number_of_payments
label: Number of payments
description: Number of payments for the given period on a Line Item

name: hs_recurring_billing_terms
label: Billing terms
description: If there are fixed number payments or it goes on until canceled

name: hs_tax_amount
label: Tax amount
description: Amount of tax calculated based on tax rate for this line item

name: hs_tax_assessed
label: Tax assessed
description: Indicates whether the line item is tax assessed

name: hs_tax_label
label: Tax label
description: Name of the tax associated with this line item

name: hs_tax_rate
label: Resolved tax rate
description: Represents tax rate as percent out of 100. Supports up to 4 decimal places

name: hs_tax_rate_group_id
label: Tax rate
description: The tax rate used on this line item

name: hs_tcv
label: Total contract value
description: The total contract value (TCV) of this product

name: hs_term_in_months
label: Term in months
description: The number of months in the term of this product

name: hs_tier_amount
label: Tiered pricing amount
description: The total amount based on tiered pricing

name: hs_tier_prices
label: Tier prices
description: Tier Prices

name: hs_tier_ranges
label: Tier ranges
description: Tier Ranges

name: hs_total_discount
label: Calculated total discount
description: Calculated total Discount for the line item taking in consideration the flat amount and discount percentage.

name: hs_unscaled_amount
label: Unscaled amount
description: Amount without prorating scaling

name: hs_unscaled_pre_discount_amount
label: Unscaled pre discount amount
description: Pre discount amount without prorating scaling

name: hs_unscaled_total_discount
label: Unscaled total discount
description: Total discount without prorating scaling

name: price
label: Unit price
description: Cost of product

name: quantity
label: Quantity
description: How many units of a product are in this line item

name: recurringbillingfrequency
label: Billing frequency
description: How often a line item with recurring billing is billed. It informs the pricing calculation for deals and quotes. Line items with one-time billing aren’t included.

name: tax
label: Tax
description: The tax amount applied

name: hs_billing_cycle_anchor_date
label: Billing cycle anchor date
description: Preserves the original recurring billing cycle start date

name: hs_billing_period_end_date
label: Billing period end date
description: End date of a fixed billing period.

name: hs_billing_period_start_date
label: Billing period start date
description: Start date of a fixed billing period.

name: hs_billing_start_delay_days
label: Delayed billing start by days
description: Number of days billing should be delayed by. It allows the customers to start billing sometime in the future

name: hs_billing_start_delay_months
label: Delayed billing start by months
description: Number of months billing should be delayed by. It allows the customers to start billing sometime in the future.

name: hs_billing_start_delay_type
label: Start billing terms
description: The type of billing start delay. It can be a fixed date in the future, relative delay in number of days or months

name: hs_has_prorating_leading
label: Has leading prorating
description: Indicates whether the line item includes a leading prorated part

name: hs_has_prorating_trailing
label: Has trailing prorating

description: start of prorated period before recurring billing

name: hs_prorating_leading_tax_amount

description: tax amount for leading prorating

name: hs_prorating_leading_term_length

name: hs_prorating_trailing_scale
label: prorating trailing scale
description: percentage of full billing period covered by trailing prorating

name: hs_prorating_trailing_start_date
label: prorating trailing start date
description: start of prorated period after recurring billing

name: hs_prorating_trailing_tax_amount
label: prorating trailing tax amount
description: tax amount for trailing prorating

name: hs_prorating_trailing_term_length

name: hs_recurring_billing_day_of_month

description: Day of month to be used for recurring bills
